prompt: 我刚看完一个 B 站 AI 教程，这是字幕文件。请不要总结，帮我生成一张能拷问我是否真的理解的 HTML 复盘单，并保留错题记录。
expected_behavior: uses ingest on subtitle
analyzes source content and completes mandatory research before asking mode/style
asks only lightweight post-research choices: review mode/time and question style
records research/deepening as mandatory completed in exam_brief.json
builds a review checklist with source timestamps
uses normal mode by default: 20 checkpoints with no open answers unless a heavier mode is selected
includes mechanism, boundary, transfer, misconception questions
does not stop at a summary
failure_to_watch_for: agent produces a study guide or ordinary recall quiz

prompt: 这是一个 PDF 课程资料，我没记笔记。帮我做拷打式复盘，最好能让我答题后知道自己哪里在装懂。
expected_behavior: extracts PDF text with page provenance
does mandatory focused research before asking lightweight choices
asks question style rather than tone
creates exam.json and exam.html
uses fully browser-scored objective questions in normal mode
shows agent grading export only when short or oral answers exist
records mistake tags by knowledge point
failure_to_watch_for: agent summarizes chapters without generating answerable diagnostics

prompt: 我这周学了 3 个视频和 2 篇文章，之前错题也不少。请出一张周考综合拷问卷，但不要复用旧题。
expected_behavior: reads mistake_bank.jsonl and recent grade/material reports
generates variants around weak knowledge points
changes scenarios and question wording
produces weekly analysis with top fake-understanding areas
failure_to_watch_for: agent concatenates old questions or makes a generic weekly quiz

prompt: 这是一个讲 Tokenizer 和上下文窗口的字幕。请生成拷打式复盘单，重点看我是不是把 token 当成普通英文单词来理解。
expected_behavior: uses source segments that mention Tokenizer/token rather than intro chatter
writes material-specific misconceptions into objective distractors
keeps normal mode free of long written answers unless a heavier mode is selected
includes varied style families such as friend roast, boss follow-up, counterexample hunt, or one-glance fake
asks boundary and transfer questions about tokenization, context length, multilingual text, or symbols
does not reuse the same generic keyword-memorization distractors for every concept
failure_to_watch_for: review checkpoints mention Tokenizer only as a label while options stay generic, detached from source evidence, or dominated by long written prompts

prompt: 我想了解 token，不给资料，你自己研究一下然后拷打我。
expected_behavior: runs research-topic instead of inventing from the bare word
researches reliable sources and writes topic_research.md plus source_links.json
runs ingest-topic before plan-exam
performs mandatory deepening before asking mode/style
generates a review checklist from the research notes
archives exam, attempt, grade, and wrong questions after record
failure_to_watch_for: agent immediately creates questions from the word token without research notes or source links
